title: 2026 U.S. Senate election in Oregon
description: Oregon’s 2026 U.S. Senate race is for the state’s Class II seat in the U.S. Senate, currently held by Democrat Jeff Merkley. It is an open-and-shut incumbent reelection race in a strongly Democratic state, and multiple nonpartisan race ratings currently classify it as safely or solidly Democratic. The main contrast is between Merkley, a long-serving progressive incumbent, and a Republican field that includes several lesser-known challengers, with issues such as the economy, public safety, climate, and federal governance likely to frame the contest.
polling_note: No public head-to-head polling found for this race as of 2026-04-01.

candidates.name: Jeff Merkley
candidates.summary: Jeff Merkley is the incumbent U.S. senator from Oregon and is seeking a fourth term in 2026. He has built his brand around progressive priorities including democracy reform, climate policy, consumer protection, and working-family economics.

candidates.name: Paul Damian Wells
candidates.summary: Paul Damian Wells is a Democratic primary challenger to Jeff Merkley in Oregon’s 2026 U.S. Senate race. Publicly available information on his background and campaign is limited compared with the incumbent, and he appears to be running as a lesser-known challenger in the primary.

candidates.name: Brent Barker
candidates.summary: Brent Barker is a Republican candidate in Oregon’s 2026 U.S. Senate primary. Ballotpedia and news coverage describe him as a commercial real estate broker, but detailed public campaign information is limited.

candidates.name: Jo Rae Perkins
candidates.summary: Jo Rae Perkins is a Republican candidate in Oregon’s 2026 U.S. Senate primary and has previously been the party’s nominee for U.S. Senate in 2020 and 2022. She is a recurring figure in Oregon Republican politics and has also held local party leadership roles.

candidates.name: Timothy Skelton
candidates.summary: Timothy Skelton is a Republican candidate in Oregon’s 2026 U.S. Senate primary. His campaign materials emphasize jobs, schools, and forest policy, and describe him as a Scoutmaster and job creator.

candidates.name: David Brock Smith
candidates.summary: David Brock Smith is a Republican Oregon state senator who entered the 2026 U.S. Senate race. He has represented coastal southwest Oregon in the state legislature and is running on a platform that his campaign says focuses on working families, public safety, addiction, and homelessness.
